fact: Ripgrep's colon-delimited text output is ambiguous when a valid path contains a colon followed by digits, while --json keeps path and line fields structurally separate.
recommendation: Parse ripgrep --json events for programmatic search integrations instead of splitting the default text format with path-and-line regular expressions.

fact: Astro file-loader data can represent multiple collection entries as an array of objects or an id-keyed object map, so counting the source file does not equal counting collection entries.
recommendation: Normalize file-loader documents into entry records before validation and summary counting; retain a single-record fallback only when object values are not all entry objects.
